description: Style NoteThis purple dress from femella is styled to become your new day-to-night staple. This versatile piece can be worn with opaque tights and block heels – try wearing with a belt. You can also wear this with a structured jacket, a box clutch and heels for a dressier occasion.Product DetailsPurple sleeveless dress, has a crossover neckline with a concealed zipper on the left side and pleats on the front Material and CareBlended fabric Dry clean preferredHand wash in cold water using a mild detergentFlat dryUse cool iron on reverseSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
